hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'frontend/.*\.tsx?$'; then cd /Users/matthewfaust/CloAgent/Clo-Agent/frontend && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'backend/.*\.go$'; then gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not modify .env files directly. Secrets and environment variables should be managed manually.' >&2; exit 2; fi
